sglang.title: [Performance] Batch Send from Tokenizer Manager.
sglang.author: sundar24295s
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The previous PR #5141 introduced batch tokenization for parallel processing.
However, when sending a batch of prompts (e.g., 50), the tokenizer manager currently transmits them individually via ZMQ socket. This can cause the batch to be split (e.g., 10 + 40) at the Scheduler, increasing

vllm.title: [Misc] Simplify FlashInfer attention metadata
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, the build method of the FlashInfer backend passes arguments to self._plan() by adding them to FlashInferMetadata, while most of them are not actually used in the forward pass. This is an unnecessary complexity and can be simply avoided by integrating self._plan() into self.build().
